src/main/java/com.marklogic/authenticato.general_idea: Replace deprecated 'new Integer(int)' constructor with 'Integer.valueOf(int)' factory method.
src/main/java/com.marklogic/authenticato.why_exists: The 'new Integer(int)' constructor was deprecated in JDK 9 and removed in JDK 18+, causing a compile error on JDK 21.
